dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses hierarchical logic: (1) Long-term trend via sma_200, (2) Chart pattern confirmation via pivot points as support/resistance proxy, (3) Entry timing at support/resistance levels. Pattern consolidation (3 bars) is monitored externally. Direction is context-dependent based on which side of 200-MA price approaches from. Exit triggers on trend break (close crossing 200-MA). Pivot points approximate swing high/low support/resistance zones mentioned in original signal.

source_rule_text: Prioritize long-term trend identification first, then current chart pattern confirmation, then precise entry timing—in that hierarchical order of importance.
